# ChatOn

> ChatOn is a free, decentralized, end-to-end encrypted messaging app built on the
> DeSo blockchain. Available as a progressive web app at getchaton.com. No phone
> number required. Zero infrastructure cost. Censorship-resistant message delivery.

## About
- [Homepage](https://getchaton.com): ChatOn landing page with features overview
- [Community Directory](https://getchaton.com/community): Browse and join public ChatOn groups
- [Privacy Policy](https://getchaton.com/privacy): ChatOn privacy policy
- [Terms of Service](https://getchaton.com/terms): ChatOn terms of service
- [Support](https://getchaton.com/support): Support ChatOn development

## Source Code
- [GitHub](https://github.com/sungkhum/chaton): ChatOn open source repository

## Key Facts
- End-to-end encrypted by default (all messages, DMs and groups)
- No phone number or email required to sign up
- Messages stored on the DeSo blockchain (censorship-resistant)
- Progressive Web App (no app store required, works on any device)
- $0/month infrastructure cost (DeSo blockchain is the data layer)
- Open source
- Features: group chats, emoji reactions, GIFs, media sharing, push notifications, community directory
